messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this section of a document.
Focus on what questions this section can answer: topics, entities, dates,
definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, and evidence types.
Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Section metadata:
{
  "node_id": "0125",
  "title": "目录 Contents",
  "page_index": 1,
  "page_range": "1"
}

Section text:
## 目录 Contents

01

中国移动游戏市场现状分析

02

海外移动游戏市场现状分析

03

移动游戏典型产品&企业案例分析

04

全球移动游戏市场发展趋势

小游戏与APP正在重新构建“多端协同”战略；即便是存量竞争时代买量仍是最主要的获客手段；2026年手游关键词：大世界捉宠+自动化基建。

message.content:
This section serves as the table of contents and executive highlights for a mobile gaming industry report. It enables retrieval of answers to the following:
- **Topics & Structure:** What are the four core analytical sections? (Chinese mobile game market status, overseas mobile game market status, typical product & company case studies, global market development trends).
- **Entities:** Which regional markets and platform types are covered? (Chinese mobile game market, overseas mobile game market, mini-games, APPs).
- **Dates:** What future year is explicitly forecasted? (2026).
- **Claims & Strategic Insights:** What are the key industry predictions? (Mini-games and APPs are rebuilding a "multi-terminal synergy" strategy; paid traffic acquisition remains the dominant user acquisition method in a stock-competition era; 2026 mobile game keywords are "open-world creature collection" and "automated infrastructure").
- **Definitions, Procedures, Tables, Figures, Metrics, Evidence Types:** Not specified in this section.
This summary supports queries regarding the report’s scope, regional coverage, case study inclusions, and forward-looking market claims.
